name: blockchainproject
description: This mini project verifies a user identity by: 1. Running OCR on an uploaded ID image via **Tesseract.js**. 2. Running a simple (mock) face verification logic on ID vs selfie. 3. Hashing OCR output with **SHA-256**. 4. Writing verification proof (`hash`, `status`) to an Ethereum smart contract on **Ganache** using **Ethers.js**.
